Package common.core.subsystems

Class TransitionManager<S extends java.lang.Enum<S>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.core.subsystems.TransitionManager<S>
  • Type Parameters:
    S - The enum type that represents the states of the graph
    public class TransitionManager<S extends java.lang.Enum<S>>
extends java.lang.Object
    A graph that represents transitions between states of an enum.

      Add a transition both ways between two states

      Adds a transition from every state to the given state

      Adds a transition from every state to the given state

      void addDivergingTransition​(S state)  
      void addDivergingTransition​(S state, edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command command)
      Adds a transition from the given state to every other state

      Adds a transition from every state to the given state

      Update the adjacency map to include the data for the given transition Note: This WILL NOT overwrite an existing Transition

    • Method Detail

      • addTransition

        public void addTransition​(Transition<S> transition)
        Update the adjacency map to include the data for the given transition Note: This WILL NOT overwrite an existing Transition
        Parameters:
        transition - The transition to add to the graph

        command - transition command to run

                                     S end,
                                     edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command run)
        Add a transition both ways between two states
        Parameters:
        start - beginning state
        end - ending state
        run - the command to run between them

                                     S end,

        Add a transition both ways between two states

      • addCommutativeTransition

        public void addCommutativeTransition​(S start,
                                     S end,
                                     edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command run1,
                                     edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command run2)
        Add a transition both ways between two states
        Parameters:
        start - beginning state
        end - ending state
        run1 - the command to run between start and end
        run2 - the command to run between end and start

      • addCommutativeTransition

        public void addCommutativeTransition​(S start,
                                     S end,
                                     java.lang.Runnable run1,
                                     java.lang.Runnable run2)
        Add a transition both ways between two states
        Parameters:
        start - beginning state
        end - ending state
        run1 - the runnable to run between start and end
        run2 - the runnable to run between end and start

      • setTransition

        public void setTransition​(Transition<S> transition)
        Update the adjacency map to include the data for the given transition. Note: This WILL override an existing transition, if one is present
        Parameters:
        transition - The transition to set to the graph

      • getTransition

        public Transition<S> getTransition​(S start,
                                   S end)
        Returns the Transition of the graph
        Parameters:
        start - starting State of the Transition
        end - ending State of the Transition
        Returns:
        the Transition, if one is found. Otherwise, the method will return null
